title: Palace Beautiful
subtitle: Rest that prepares courage
subtitle_zh: 使勇气重新预备的安息
intro: At the summit, lamplight spills from a house where pilgrims are not shamed for being tired.
Here rest is not escape. It is obedience to the One who knows what waits in the valley.
Listen to Watchful, read the records, and take up the armour of faith before accusation learns your name again.
intro_zh: 夜色降下，美宫的门为疲惫的旅人打开。
安息不是离开争战，而是为下一段路重新预备。
听守望者的话，穿戴军装，因为控告者正在山谷等候。
spiritual_theme: Fellowship, holy rest, and preparation for accusation
core_mechanic: Rest, receive Watchful's counsel, read the testimony of former pilgrims, and take up armour before descending into the Valley of Humiliation.
core_mechanic_zh: 休息、聆听守望者，并穿戴为山谷预备的军装。

design.provenance: Attachment Ch6 美宫 + Ch7 神圣军装厅 (Skills 25-26) — the armory is folded into this scene.

seven_beats.arrival: Watchful the porter halts you at the gate and asks who you are and why you come so late.
seven_beats.orientation: A cross-crowned tower, a fellowship hall, a rest room, the armoury door, and a chapel.
seven_beats.encounter: Discretion, Prudence, Piety and Charity welcome and examine you; you tell your story.
seven_beats.temptation: Self-reliant boasting — to make much of how far YOU have come.
seven_beats.choice: Rest with thanksgiving / review the journey in prayer / boast of your progress.
seven_beats.consequence: Thanksgiving restores hope; boasting swells pride and dulls watchfulness.
seven_beats.grace: Take up the whole armour of God before descending into the Valley of Humiliation.

chapel.verse_zh: 你们要彼此接待，如同基督接待你们。
chapel.verse_en: Welcome one another as Christ has welcomed you.
chapel.hint_zh: 在团契中安息，并预备穿上军装。

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 看你走了多远，你已经够刚强了。

armory.symbol: Eph 6 — the whole armour of God

pieces.guards: standing not on one's own merit
steady footing, readiness of the gospel
the mind, the assurance of salvation
the Word — the one offensive weapon

design.stat_arc_note: Rest restores hope/weariness; the armoury sets has_armor/has_sword/has_shield for the warfare arc.
